title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 21/02/2023
Image reference: 2023-02-21_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-february-21-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have remained stable
Capesize Golden Ocean acquire x 6 Chinese built Newcastlemax vessels (208,000 DWT, build year 2017 - 2021), all with 36 month TC back ($21,000/day) in an En bloc deal with H Line worth USD 291 mil, VV Value USD 279.3 mil
Capesize Ocean Caesar (180,200 DWT, Jun 2008, Imabari) sold to Winning Shipping for USD 19.70 mil, VV Value USD 20.87 mil - BWTS. Panamax Omicron Crest (76,700 DWT, Nov 2004, Sasebo) sold to Lintas Maritim Indonesia for USD 12.00 mil, VV Value USD 12.59 mil - DD Passed. Ultramax Nord Potomac (63,500 DWT, Aug 2016, I-S) sold to Diana Shipping for USD 27.90 mil, VV Value USD 28.08 mil - Scrubber.
